programs.name: Arizona Tuition Waiver (Foster Youth Award)
programs.what_it_covers: Remaining tuition and mandatory fees after all other grants/scholarships applied

application.deadline: Rolling — apply as soon as eligible

programs.notes: Applied AFTER all other grants/scholarships. ETV is the only grant NOT counted against it.

programs.name: Arizona Education and Training Voucher (ETV)
programs.what_it_covers: Tuition, housing, books, student loan repayments, qualified living expenses
programs.notes: First-come first-served. Not counted against the tuition waiver.

programs.name: Federal Pell Grant
programs.what_it_covers: Tuition, fees, room and board, books, supplies, transportation

eligibility.foster_youth_advantage: Automatically classified as independent student — no parental info required
eligibility.answer_yes_if: You were in foster care, a group home, or kinship placement any time after age 13

programs.name: Bridging Success Program (Maricopa Community Colleges)
programs.what_it_covers: Campus champions, tutoring, mentoring, basic needs, career exploration

programs.name: ASU Foster Youth Programs
programs.what_it_covers: Dedicated support office, tuition waiver + ETV + campus resources

programs.name: Arizona Medicaid (AHCCCS) — Former Foster Youth
programs.what_it_covers: Health insurance until age 26 regardless of income

school_transcripts.note: Gaps from school changes are expected — not a barrier.

proof_of_foster_care.how_to_get: DCS, former caseworker, or court records.
proof_of_foster_care.note: Often the hardest to get. ETV portal may help verify.

state_id.how_to_get: Arizona MVD. Bring birth cert + SSN + AZ address proof.
